tools.name: clitoken.createCliToken
tools.description: Creates a CLI token for the Airflow CLI. To learn more, see Creating an Apache Airflow CLI token.

tools.name: environments.createEnvironment
tools.description: Creates an Amazon Managed Workflows for Apache Airflow (MWAA) environment.

tools.name: environments.deleteEnvironment
tools.description: Deletes an Amazon Managed Workflows for Apache Airflow (MWAA) environment.

tools.name: environments.getEnvironment
tools.description: Describes an Amazon Managed Workflows for Apache Airflow (MWAA) environment.

tools.name: environments.listEnvironments
tools.description: Lists the Amazon Managed Workflows for Apache Airflow (MWAA) environments.

tools.name: environments.updateEnvironment
tools.description: Updates an Amazon Managed Workflows for Apache Airflow (MWAA) environment.

tools.name: metrics.publishMetrics
tools.description: Internal only. Publishes environment health metrics to Amazon CloudWatch.

tools.name: tags.listTagsForResource
tools.description: Lists the key-value tag pairs associated to the Amazon Managed Workflows for Apache Airflow (MWAA) environment. For example, "Environment": "Staging".

tools.name: tags.tagResource
tools.description: Associates key-value tag pairs to your Amazon Managed Workflows for Apache Airflow (MWAA) environment.

tools.name: tags.untagResource
tools.description: Removes key-value tag pairs associated to your Amazon Managed Workflows for Apache Airflow (MWAA) environment. For example, "Environment": "Staging".

tools.name: webtoken.createWebLoginToken
tools.description: Creates a web login token for the Airflow Web UI. To learn more, see Creating an Apache Airflow web login token.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
